name: coTfsSDOCalcCrc
title: coTfsSDOCalcCrc
syntax: dword coTfsSDOCalcCrc( byte inValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize );
description: This function calculates the CRC checksum for a block transfer (SDO block upload or SDO block download)- necessary for the calculation of the CRC across several data ranges).

parameters.name: inValueBuf[]
parameters.description: In this data field are the data for which the CRC calculation is executed.
